expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly states the case focus and details the required separation: “Modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering” and enumerates separate scenario groups for (1) “Contextual-link styling” and (2) “Ordinary element rendering,” plus (3) “Differentiation / side-by-side comparison.”

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The result is explicitly framed as Phase 4a: title “Phase 4a phase-contract check,” section “Phase 4a alignment requirements (contract),” and it limits claims to phase4a artifacts: “The result is scoped to phase4a contract expectations only… No claims were made about later phases.”
